subject: [PATCH 3/3] mm: read remote memory without the mmap lock where possible

reviews.author: Rik van Riel
reviews.summary: Raised concern about preserving structural consistency of the VMA tree during reads and suggested that content consistency is not protected either.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Tended to agree with Rik's concern and suggested falling back to the mmap lock for now when more than one VMA is involved.

2026-06-19.patch_summary: The patch aims to read remote memory without the mmap lock where possible, but some reviewers are concerned about preserving structural consistency of the VMA tree during reads.
